patch.value: GH-562: pm init rejects --id-prefix/--prefix flag though id prefix is only positional

GH-562: the workspace id prefix is configured by the field literally named id_prefix, so agents naturally try 'pm init --id-prefix opstest' and hit Unknown option (exit 2). Every other init setup value is flag-based (--author, --preset, ...), making the positional-only prefix the odd one out. Fix = add --id-prefix (and optionally --prefix) as a flag alias; wire through the full new-flag checklist. Related: pm-kl19 owns RENAMING an existing prefix (GH-548); this item is creation-time input ergonomics only. pm-3mna's init SDK slice will carry the same option surface — land this before or with that slice to avoid contract churn.

pm init accepts --id-prefix <value> as an alias for the positional prefix argument (positional form stays supported); conflicting positional + flag values fail fast with a clear message; help text, completion (bash+zsh+fish), contracts (cli-contracts.ts flag contracts + MCP schema), and docs updated per the new-flag wiring checklist; regression spec covers flag form, positional form, and the conflict case
